channel.title: How to multiple posts in single post template
channel.description: I want to show multiple post in single post templete. how to do that ? please help

item.title: How to multiple posts in single post template
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @techymanjil96

Sorry for the delay in the answer. We lost track of this post from all the posts we (Frontity Team) moderate

Did you manage to solve this issue?
With Frontity you can easily make use of data from WordPress to display data in any way you want.
Maybe you can get some ideas for solving your specific need by having a look at the documentation of wp-source package
https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source

Hope this helps

Read full topic
item.source: How to multiple posts in single post template

item.title: How to multiple posts in single post template

please help
